description:
Parse pyproject.toml to extract dependencies:
- Read [project.dependencies] array (PEP 621)
- Read [project.optional-dependencies] for extras
- Handle [tool.poetry.dependencies] for Poetry projects
- Handle version specifiers (>=, ~=, ==, etc.)
- Consider [tool.uv.sources] for monorepo local deps (skip these)

Key challenge: pyproject.toml specifies version RANGES, not pinned versions.
May need to resolve to specific versions via PyPI API.
title: Implement pyproject.toml parsing
